author: boxthatbeat
description: Import your tasks from your TFS (Azure or Jira) to take notes on them and make todo-lists!

manifest.author: BoxThatBeat
manifest.description: Import your tasks from your TFS (Azure or Jira) to take notes on them and make todo-lists!
manifest.name: Agile Task Notes

name: Agile Task Notes

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Added additional optional fields for Azure TFS backend. by @nishantg96 in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/31
* Fixed incorrect Azure BaseURL by @nishantg96 in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/32
* Change file name by @bcwilsondotcom in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/33

## New Contributors
* @nishantg96 made their first contribution in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/31
* @bcwilsondotcom made their first contribution in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/33

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/compare/1.3.2...1.4.0

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Error in plugin when udpating tasks from AzureDevops in Team Leader Mode by @jswright91 in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/26

## New Contributors
* @jswright91 made their first contribution in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/26

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/compare/1.3.1...1.3.2

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Don't delete existing boards. by @guildencrantz in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/22

## New Contributors
* Thanks to @guildencrantz who made their first contribution in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/22

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description: - Fixed a bug with team leader mode where tasks that were not assigned to anyone would cause an error.

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Completed feature #14 
* Can now pull tasks for as many users as needed
* Added a "Team Leader Mode" which will pull the tasks of all users on a board or team. Also displays the "assigned to" field in the generated Kanban board for ease of viewing

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description:
## New Jira Feature:
* Jira Kanban mode by @froznsm in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/16

Enjoy a new Jira mode that allows simple Kanban configurations to be seamlessly integrated with Obsidian.

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Alternative authmode by @froznsm in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/13
* I added {{TASK_DESCRIPTION}} as an optional field to complete issue #12 

## New Contributors
* @froznsm made their first contribution in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/13

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description:
- Applied multiple pull requests that fixed bugs, thank you contributors!
- Applied pull request that added new fields for note templates
- Fixed a bug where if the ID for the tasks was very short such as 1, it would pick up other files in the vault such as daily notes that contained a 1 in the date title

## What's Changed
* [#4] [Feature Request] Add task "Assigned To" field by @ssenart in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/5
* Mtuckerb/use sprint name option by @mtuckerb in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/9
* Too much data from Azure DevOps by @izzap in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/10

## New Contributors
* @ssenart made their first contribution in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/5
* @izzap made their first contribution in https://github.com/BoxThatBeat/obsidian-agile-task-notes/pull/10

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description: - Adds a toggle for sprint name to be displayed for Jira. Thanks to @mtuckerb for the feature!

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description: Added change by @marcus-crane that fixes a bug where if there are more than 50 historical sprints in Jira, it would not find the active sprint and not function.

releases.author: BoxThatBeat
releases.description: * Fixed: issues found in Obsidian review
